CVE-2022-48279.title: In ModSecurity before 2.9.6 and 3.x before 3.0.8, HTTP multipart  ...
CVE-2022-48279.description: In ModSecurity before 2.9.6 and 3.x before 3.0.8, HTTP multipart requests were incorrectly parsed and could bypass the Web Application Firewall. NOTE: this is related to CVE-2022-39956 but can be considered independent changes to the ModSecurity (C language) codebase.

CVE-2023-24021.title: Incorrect handling of '\0' bytes in file uploads in ModSecurity b ...
CVE-2023-24021.description: Incorrect handling of '\0' bytes in file uploads in ModSecurity before 2.9.7 may allow for Web Application Firewall bypasses and buffer over-reads on the Web Application Firewall when executing rules that read the FILES_TMP_CONTENT collection.
